name: Inhumans Royal Family
description: Maximus the Mad stages a coup against his brother Black Bolt, plunging Attilan into civil war. The Inhuman Royal Family must reclaim their throne while Terrigen Mists reshape the political landscape of their hidden civilization.
flavorText: The throne of Attilan is not inherited. It is defended.
musicAIPrompt: Create a 45-second seamless loopable orchestral film score in the exact style of John Williams. Grand March / Processional. Inhuman Royal Family civil war in Attilan. Regal brass and crystalline percussion. Majestic and royal, wide stereo, instrumental only, perfectly loopable with no fade in/out.
tips: The key mechanic of this scheme is Abomination: each Villain gets +attack equal to the printed attack of the Hero in the HQ space directly under that Villain's city space. Prioritize fighting or KO-ing Heroes in the HQ who have high printed attack values to keep the Villain deck manageable.
